sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons_table (id UInt32, polygon1 Array(Array(Float64)), polygon2 Array(Array(Float64)));
SELECT id, polygonsDistanceCartesian(polygon1, polygon2) AS distance FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE polygons_table SET polygon2 = [[[(5, 5), (5, 6), (6, 6), (6, 5)]]] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, polygonsDistanceCartesian(polygon1, polygon2) AS new_distance FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1;
